greeting.speaker: Frank
greeting.text: You got a good face. Not many people got a good face around here.

what_means.speaker: Frank
what_means.text: Means what it means. Some folks got a face that's all the way theirs. Yours is almost there.

alright.speaker: Frank
alright.text: Better than most days. Worse than some. I get by.

pause.speaker: Frank
pause.text: You ever get the feeling you're waiting for something? Can't say what. Just... waiting.

choices.text: What are you waiting for Frank?

frank_waiting.speaker: Frank
frank_waiting.text: Me? I'm done waiting. Already found what I was looking for. Took a while though. Long while.

farewell.speaker: Frank
farewell.text: You come talk to me anytime. I'll be right here.

greeting_return.speaker: Frank
greeting_return.text: Back again. Good. Sit a spell if you want.
